landing.title: Welcome
landing.heading: Quartier Bike ID
landing.subtitle: Community bicycle registration for your neighbourhood. Register your bikes, get QR code labels, and help recover stolen bicycles.
landing.how_it_works_subtitle: Four simple steps to protect your bike.
landing.step1_text: Enter your email — no password needed. We send you a login link.
landing.step2_text: Register your bikes with a photo, colour, and brand.
landing.step3_text: Each bike gets a unique QR code sticker printed on a Dymo label.
landing.step4_text: Anyone who finds your bike scans the QR and can contact you.
landing.feature_qr_text: Each bike gets a unique QR code. Anyone can scan it to identify the owner.
landing.feature_stolen_text: If your bike is stolen, scanning the QR can share the finder's location with you.
landing.feature_privacy_text: Data stays on a local server in Switzerland. Location data auto-deletes after 90 days.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.complete_profile: Please enter your name to complete your account.
auth.email_required: Please enter a valid email address
auth.login_required: Please log in to access this page
auth.step1_text: Type your email address below. Works for new and existing accounts.
auth.step2_text: We send you a secure login link that expires in 15 minutes.
auth.step3_text: One click and you're logged in. No password to remember.
auth.step4_text: New users enter their name once to complete registration.
auth.no_password_note: No password needed — your email is your identity.
auth.magic_link_explain: Enter your email to receive a login link. No password needed.
auth.magic_link_info: Works for new and existing accounts.
auth.secret_question: What is the name of our street?
auth.secret_hint: Only neighbourhood residents know the answer.
auth.wrong_secret: Incorrect answer to the security question. Please try again.
auth.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait an hour and try again.
auth.check_email_text: We sent a login link to:
auth.link_expires_info: The link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.
auth.link_expired_text: This login link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.
auth.link_invalid_text: This login link is not valid. It may have been truncated or modified.

dashboard.title: My Bikes
dashboard.no_bikes: You haven't registered any bikes yet.

bikes.description_placeholder: Any identifying details: model, size, accessories...
bikes.photo_hint: JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP. Max 5 MB.
bikes.photo_keep_hint: JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP. Max 5 MB. Leave empty to keep current photo.
bikes.garage_checkbox: This bicycle parks in the building garage
bikes.garage_info: Annual garage contribution: CHF 40.00 per bicycle. Payment is voluntary via TWINT. You will receive a TWINT payment QR code with your bike sticker.
bikes.qr_scan_hint: Scan this QR code to view the public page for this bike.
bikes.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bike? This cannot be undone.
bikes.confirm_stolen: Are you sure you want to mark this bike as stolen?
bikes.registered_success: Bike registered! QR code generated for
bikes.stolen_success: marked as stolen. GPS tracking is now active on scans.
bikes.add_failed: Failed to register bike. Please try again.
bikes.update_failed: Failed to update bike. Please try again.
bikes.delete_failed: Failed to delete bike. Please try again.
bikes.not_found: Bicycle not found or access denied

public.contact_subtitle: Found this bike? Send a message to the owner.
public.contact_optional: Your name and phone are optional.
public.message_placeholder: e.g. I found your bike at the train station...
public.privacy_notice: Your message goes directly to the owner. No data is shared with third parties.
public.stolen_heading: This bicycle has been reported stolen
public.stolen_location_ask: We would like to share your current location with the owner to help recover this bike.
public.stolen_location_info: Your location will only be used for this purpose and automatically deleted after 90 days.
public.location_shared: Thank you — location shared with the owner.
public.location_denied: Location permission denied — no problem. Use the contact form below.
public.location_not_shared: Location not shared — you can still use the contact form below.
public.location_error: Could not send location. The contact form below still works.
public.location_network_error: Network error. Please use the contact form below.
public.location_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
public.stolen_contact_subtitle: If you know where this bike is, please let the owner know.
public.stolen_privacy_notice: Location data auto-deletes after 90 days. No data shared with third parties.
public.contact_sent_text: Your message has been sent to the bike owner. They will see your contact information if you provided it.
public.contact_sent_privacy: Your information is only shared with the bike owner and is never used for any other purpose.

map.community_subtitle: Approximate locations where stolen bikes have been scanned in the neighbourhood.
map.owner_subtitle: Exact locations where your stolen bike was scanned.
map.approximate_notice: Locations are approximate (~200m) to protect privacy.
map.owner_privacy_notice: Only you can see these exact locations. Data auto-deletes after 90 days.
map.admin_notice: Showing all scan locations with GPS data. Red = stolen, blue = active.

errors.not_found: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
errors.server_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.load_failed: Could not load data. Please try again.
